chapter_title.en: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification

text: 271 - وَ رُوِيَ: «أَنَّ مَنِ اِطَّلَى وَ تَدَلَّكَ بِالْحِنَّاءِ مِنْ قَرْنِهِ إِلَى قَدَمِهِ نَفَى اَللَّهُ عَنْهُ اَلْفَقْرَ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.271 - It is narrated (from Ahmad ibn Abi Abdullah) that he narrates:
"Whoever applies a depilatory substance and massages himself with henna from head to toe, Allah (swt) removes poverty from him."
